header_title.description: Izina ry'porogaramu ryerekanwa mu mutwe. Porogaramu yo gusanga uburyo butandukanye bwo guteka ku isi.

header_subtitle.text: Sangiza uburyo bwo guteka buturutse impande zose z'isi
header_subtitle.description: Ijambo riri munsi y'izina ry'porogaramu mu mutwe.

home_page_hero_title.description: Umutwe nyamukuru uri mu gice cya hero ku rupapuro rw'imbere.

home_page_hero_subtitle.text: Sura uburyo bw'ukuri bwo guteka buturutse mu byumba byo ku isi yose
home_page_hero_subtitle.description: Ijambo riri munsi y'umwanya w'umutwe ku rupapuro rw'imbere.

home_page_featured_title.description: Umutwe w'igice ugaragara hejuru y'amakarita y'uburyo bwo guteka.

recipe_card_cooking_time.description: Igihe cyo guteka kigaragazwa ku ikarita y'uburyo bwo guteka. {minutes} isimburwa n'umubare w'amasegonda.

recipe_card_difficulty.description: Icyapa kigaragazwa mbere y'urwego rw'ubugororangingo ku ikarita y'uburyo bwo guteka.

recipe_card_easy.description: Ikimenyetso cy'urwego rw'ubugororangingo kigaragaza ko uburyo bwo guteka ari bworoshye.

recipe_card_medium.description: Ikimenyetso cy'urwego rw'ubugororangingo kigaragaza ko uburyo bwo guteka bufite ubugororangingo buri hagati.

recipe_card_hard.description: Ikimenyetso cy'urwego rw'ubugororangingo kigaragaza ko uburyo bwo guteka ari bugoye.

recipe_card_ramen_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_ramen_description.text: Isupu y'imbavu z'ingurube itetse neza ifite inyama zoroshye za chashu, igi cyokeje gitekereje, n'udusenda dushya.
recipe_card_ramen_description.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Tonkotsu Ramen.

recipe_card_margherita_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_margherita_description.text: Pizza gakondo yo muri Neapolitan ikozwe mu matomate ya San Marzano, mozzarella nshya, na basil.
recipe_card_margherita_description.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Pizza ya Margherita.

recipe_card_tacos_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_tacos_description.text: Tacos z'inyama z'ingurube zatekeye mu mavuta hamwe n'ipineapple, coriander, n'igitunguru ku mafunguro y'ibigori.
recipe_card_tacos_description.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Tacos al Pastor.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Inkoko ya Butter.

recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.text: Inkoko yoroshye mu isosi y'amatomate na beurre hamwe n'ibinyobwa by'imitunganyirize myiza y'ibinyomoro.
recipe_card_butter_chicken_description.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Inkoko ya Butter.

recipe_card_pad_thai_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Pad Thai.

recipe_card_pad_thai_description.text: Noodles z'umuceri zitetse mu mavuta hamwe na shrimp, tofu, ibinyomoro, na sosisi ya tamarind.
recipe_card_pad_thai_description.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Pad Thai.

recipe_card_crepes_name.description: Izina ry'uburyo bwo guteka Crepes z'Abafaransa.

recipe_card_crepes_description.text: Crepes zoroshye kandi zinononsoye zishyirwamo Nutella, amacunga mashya, n'ifu y'inkoko.
recipe_card_crepes_description.description: Ibisobanuro by'uburyo bwo guteka Crepes z'Abafaransa.
